class.name: FmodDSP
class.brief_description: Wrapper for FMOD::DSP, providing digital signal processing effects.
class.description: FmodDSP wraps the FMOD Core API's DSP (Digital Signal Processing) unit. It provides access to various audio effects and processing units such as oscillators, filters, reverb, delay, and more. DSP units can be connected together to form complex audio processing chains.

method.name: add_input
method.description: Adds a DSP unit as an input to this DSP. Returns the connection handle.

method.name: disconnect_all
method.description: Disconnects all inputs and/or outputs from this DSP.

method.name: disconnect_from
method.description: Disconnects this DSP from the specified target DSP.

method.name: get_active
method.description: Returns whether this DSP is currently active (processing).

method.name: get_bypass
method.description: Returns whether this DSP is currently bypassed.

method.name: get_channel_format
method.description: Returns a dictionary containing the channel format information: [code]num_channels[/code] and [code]speaker_mode[/code].

method.name: get_cpu_usage
method.description: Returns CPU usage statistics for this DSP. Contains [code]exclusive[/code] and [code]inclusive[/code] values.

method.name: get_data_parameter_index
method.description: Gets the index of the first data parameter of the specified data type.

method.name: get_idle
method.description: Returns whether the DSP is currently idle (not processing any audible input).

method.name: get_info
method.description: Returns information about the DSP including [code]name[/code], [code]version[/code], [code]config_width[/code], and [code]config_height[/code].

method.name: get_input
method.description: Gets the DSP and connection at the specified input index. Returns a dictionary with [code]output[/code] and [code]output_connection[/code].

method.name: get_metering_enabled
method.description: Returns metering enabled state for input and output signals. Contains [code]input_enabled[/code] and [code]output_enabled[/code].

method.name: get_metering_info
method.description: Returns metering information for input and output signals. Contains [code]input[/code] and [code]output[/code] dictionaries with peak and RMS levels.

method.name: get_num_inputs
method.description: Returns the number of input DSP connections.

method.name: get_num_outputs
method.description: Returns the number of output DSP connections.

method.name: get_num_parameters
method.description: Returns the number of parameters exposed by this DSP unit.

method.name: get_output
method.description: Gets the DSP and connection at the specified output index. Returns a dictionary with [code]input[/code] and [code]input_connection[/code].

method.name: get_output_channel_format
method.description: Gets the output channel format based on the specified input format. Returns a dictionary with [code]out_channels[/code] and [code]out_speaker_mode[/code].

method.name: get_parameter_bool
method.description: Gets a boolean parameter value by index.

method.name: get_parameter_data
method.description: Gets a binary data parameter value by index.

method.name: get_parameter_float
method.description: Gets a float parameter value by index.

method.name: get_parameter_info
method.description: Gets information about the specified parameter, including type, name, label, description, and value ranges.

method.name: get_parameter_int
method.description: Gets an integer parameter value by index.

method.name: get_system_object
method.description: Gets the parent FMOD system object.

method.name: get_type
method.description: Gets the predefined type of this DSP unit.

method.name: get_wet_dry_mix
method.description: Gets the wet/dry mix ratios. Returns a dictionary with [code]prewet[/code], [code]postwet[/code], and [code]dry[/code] values.

method.name: release
method.description: Releases the DSP unit and frees its memory.

method.name: reset
method.description: Resets the DSP's internal state to prepare it for new input signals.

method.name: set_active
method.description: Sets whether the DSP is active (processing).

method.name: set_bypass
method.description: Sets whether the DSP should be bypassed.

method.name: set_channel_format
method.description: Sets the PCM channel format this DSP receives during processing.

method.name: set_metering_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables metering for input and output signals.

method.name: set_parameter_bool
method.description: Sets a boolean parameter value by index.

method.name: set_parameter_data
method.description: Sets a binary data parameter value by index.

method.name: set_parameter_float
method.description: Sets a float parameter value by index.

method.name: set_parameter_int
method.description: Sets an integer parameter value by index.

method.name: set_wet_dry_mix
method.description: Sets the wet and dry signal mix ratios.

members.member: Whether the DSP is currently active and processing.
Whether the DSP is bypassed (input passes through unprocessed).

constants.constant: DSP created through a non-FMOD plugin, purpose unknown.
Does not process the signal, acts purely as a unit for mixing inputs.
Generates sine/square/saw/triangle or noise tones.
High quality resonant lowpass filter (deprecated).
Resonant lowpass filter used in Impulse Tracker, limited cutoff range (0 to 8060Hz).
Resonant highpass filter (deprecated).
Produces echo on the sound and fades at the desired rate.
Pans and scales the volume of the unit.
Produces a flange effect on the sound.
Distorts the sound.
Normalizes or amplifies the sound to a certain level.
Limits the sound to a certain volume level.
Attenuates or amplifies a selected frequency range (deprecated).
Changes the pitch of the sound without changing playback speed.
Produces a chorus effect on the sound.
Produces echo on the sound and fades at the rate used in Impulse Tracker.
Dynamic compression (linked/unlinked multi-channel, wideband).
I3DL2 reverb effect.
Simple lowpass without resonance but with flexible cutoff and fast.
Produces different delays on individual channels of the sound.
Produces a tremolo/chopping effect on the sound.
Sends a signal copy to a return DSP anywhere in the DSP tree.
Receives signals from multiple send DSPs.
Simple highpass without resonance but with very flexible cutoff and fast.
Can pan the signal in 2D or 3D, possibly with upmixing or downmixing.
Three-band equalizer.
Analyzes the signal and returns spectrum information via getParameter.
Analyzes the loudness and true peak of the signal.
Convolution reverb effect.
Provides per-channel gain, channel grouping of input signals, and routing.
Transceiver that can send and receive from up to 32 different slots.
Spatializes by passing input signal to the external object mixer.
Five-band parametric equalizer.
Multiband dynamics processor (deprecated).
Maximum number of DSP types.
Forces the DSP type to be an integer type.
User-defined data parameter type.
Overall gain data parameter type.
3D attributes data parameter type.
Sidechain data parameter type.
FFT spectrum data parameter type.
Multi-instance 3D attributes data parameter type.
Attenuation range data parameter type.
Dynamic response data parameter type.
Finite length data parameter type.
